chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D –6181 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judges Fresh Case. 1. For order on Misc No.26187/2021. 2. For order on Misc No.26188/2021. 3. For order on Misc No.26189/2021. 4. For hearing of main case: 14.10.2021: Muhammad Ali Isani, petitioner present in person. ----------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. Through the instant petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan 1973, the petitioner has assailed major penalty of compulsory retirement from service imposed by the respondent-KPT vide order dated 09.03.2021 on the ground of misconduct. Petitioner present in person has submitted that during the pendency of appeal against the impugned action taken by the respondent-KPT and under the garb of the order dated 09.03.2021, they are bent upon to kick out him and his family members from the official accommodation, till the decision of his statutory appeal pending adjudication before the competent authority. The contention raised required consideration, issue notice to respondents as well as learned DAG for 28.10.2021 with direction to file comments. In the meanwhile, competent authority of respondent-KPT is directed not to disturb the petitioner and his family from the official accommodation provided to him by the KPT management. J U D G E J U D G E Shahzad
